title: rubus haematostylus
intro: Rubus haematostylus, also known as the Blood Style Raspberry, is a type of wild raspberry native to Asia, characterized by its reddish-purple stems and small, edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus haematostylus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
